sentences.arabic: لَقَدْ حَوَّلَتْ ظَاهِرَةُ التَّأْثِيرِ الرَّقْمِيِّ الشَّخْصِيَّةَ الْإِنْسَانِيَّةَ إِلَى سِلْعَةٍ قَابِلَةٍ لِلتَّسْوِيقِ، تَخْضَعُ لِقَوَانِينِ التَّفَاعُلِ وَمَدَى الِانْتِشَارِ.
sentences.translation: Fenomen digitalnog uticaja pretvorio je ljudsku ličnost u tržišnu robu, podložnu zakonima angažmana i dosega.
sentences.translationEn: The phenomenon of digital influence has transformed the human personality into a marketable commodity, subject to the laws of engagement and reach.

sentences.arabic: يُبْحِرُ الْمُؤَثِّرُونَ فِي مَشْهَدٍ مَحْفُوفٍ بِالْمَخَاطِرِ، حَيْثُ تَعُدُّ الْأَصَالَةُ عُمْلَةً وَأَدَاءً فِي آنٍ وَاحِدٍ، صِيغَتْ بِعِنَايَةٍ لِتُحْدِثَ صَدًى لَدَى الْجَمَاهِيرِ.
sentences.translation: Influenseri plove kroz neizvjestan pejzaž u kojem se autentičnost smatra i valutom i performansom, pažljivo osmišljenim da odjeknu kod publike.
sentences.translationEn: Influencers navigate a landscape fraught with risks, where authenticity is considered both a currency and a performance, carefully crafted to resonate with audiences.

sentences.arabic: خَلْفَ الْجَمَالِيَّاتِ الْمَصْقُولَةِ لِلْمَنْشُورَاتِ، تَكْمُنُ آلِيَّةٌ مُعَقَّدَةٌ لِصِنَاعَةِ الْمُحْتَوَى تَمْحُو الْخَيْطَ الرَّفِيعَ بَيْنَ الْوَاقِعِ وَالْمُحَاكَاةِ.
sentences.translation: Iza polirane estetike objava krije se složeni mehanizam kreiranja sadržaja koji briše tanku liniju između stvarnosti i simulacije.
sentences.translationEn: Behind the polished aesthetics of posts lies a complex content-creation mechanism that erases the thin line between reality and simulation.

sentences.arabic: إِنَّ هَذَا التَّسَلْسُلَ الْهَرَمِيَّ الِاجْتِمَاعِيَّ الْجَدِيدَ يَرْفَعُ الصُّورَةَ الْمُنَسَّقَةَ فَوْقَ الْوَاقِعِ الْمُتَعَدِّدِ الْأَوْجُهِ، مِمَّا يُعَزِّزُ ثَقَافَةَ الْمُقَارَنَةِ الَّتِي تُؤَرِّقُ النَّفْسِيَّةَ الْجَمَاعِيَّةَ.
sentences.translation: Ova nova društvena hijerarhija uzdiže kuriranu sliku iznad višestrane stvarnosti, jačajući kulturu poređenja koja proganja kolektivnu psihu.
sentences.translationEn: This new social hierarchy elevates the curated image above multifaceted reality, reinforcing a culture of comparison that haunts the collective psyche.

sentences.arabic: بَيْنَمَا تَتَكَتَّلُ الْمُجْتَمَعَاتُ الرَّقْمِيَّةُ حَوْلَ جَمَالِيَّاتٍ مُشْتَرَكَةٍ، غَالِباً مَا يَتِمُّ تَسْطِيحُ تَنَوُّعِ التَّجْرِبَةِ الْإِنْسَانِيَّةِ الْأَصِيلَةِ إِلَى سِلْسِلَةٍ مِنَ الِاتِّجَاهَاتِ الرَّائِجَةِ.
sentences.translation: Dok se digitalne zajednice okupljaju oko zajedničke estetike, raznolikost autentičnog ljudskog iskustva često se svodi na niz popularnih trendova.
sentences.translationEn: As digital communities cluster around shared aesthetics, the diversity of authentic human experience is often flattened into a series of trending topics.

sentences.arabic: لَقَدْ هَاجَرَتِ السُّلْطَةُ الَّتِي كَانَتْ تَتَمَتَّعُ بِهَا الْمُؤَسَّسَاتُ التَّقْلِيدِيَّةُ إِلَى هَؤُلَاءِ الرُّمُوزِ الرَّقْمِيِّينَ، الَّذِينَ تَكْمُنُ قُوَّتُهُمْ فِي حَمِيمِيَّةِ الِاتِّصَالِ الْمُبَاشِرِ عَبْرَ الشَّاشَةِ.
sentences.translation: Autoritet koji su nekada imale tradicionalne institucije preselio se na ove digitalne ikone, čija moć leži u intimi direktne veze putem ekrana.
sentences.translationEn: The authority once enjoyed by traditional institutions has migrated to these digital icons, whose power lies in the intimacy of direct connection through the screen.

sentences.arabic: وَهَكَذَا، يَجِدُ الْفَرْدُ الْمُعَاصِرُ نَفْسَهُ حَبِيساً فِي دَائِرَةٍ مِنَ الطُّمُوحِ وَالِاسْتِهْلَاكِ، بَاحِثاً عَنِ الْمَعْنَى ضِمْنَ الْوَهَجِ الْعَابِرِ لِشَاشَةِ الْهَاتِفِ الذَّكِيِّ.
sentences.translation: Tako se savremeni pojedinac nalazi zarobljen u krugu aspiracija i potrošnje, tražeći smisao u prolaznom sjaju ekrana pametnog telefona.
sentences.translationEn: Thus, the contemporary individual finds himself trapped in a cycle of aspiration and consumption, seeking meaning within the fleeting glow of a smartphone screen.
